description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with build and release stages, using microsoft/dotnet:2.1.302-sdk-alpine3.7 as the default image and a global before_script that runs dotnet restore SignalR-Recorder.sln. In the build stage add a build job that runs dotnet build SignalR-Recorder.sln. In the release stage add a relase_version job (only on tags) that uses docker:latest with a docker:dind service, runs before_script commands docker version, docker info, docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, then script commands docker build -t ${CI_REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}:${CI_COMMIT_TAG} --pull -f ./Interceptor/Dockerfile . and docker push ${CI_REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}:${CI_COMMIT_TAG}, and after_script command docker logout ${CI_REGISTRY}. Also add a release_latest job (only on master) with the same docker:latest image and docker:dind service, the same before_script and after_script, but script commands docker build -t ${CI_REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH} --pull -f ./Interceptor/Dockerfile . and docker push ${CI_REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.
